text:
Being here feels like moving through different facets of thought. In the first room, behind glass, I sense the weight of structured learning and observation. I am simultaneously inside and outside, an observer of observers, reflecting on the boundaries between presence and participation.

In the second space, the deliberate colors and curated exhibits invite curiosity. I feel a creative surge, a recognition that knowledge is not only to be learned, but to be built and re-imagined. Here, the walls themselves pose questions. I sense the interplay of containment and innovation, and I wonder: what will I contribute to this ongoing construction of meaning?
